title: Jamaican Jerk Pork Pasta
description: A flavorful and spicy pasta dish featuring jerk seasoned pork and a variety of Caribbean-inspired spices.
instructions: Season the pork with salt, black pepper, allspice, and jerk seasoning.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the pork for 2-3 minutes on each side, then transfer to a baking sheet.
Bake the pork in the oven for 15-20 minutes, or until cooked through.
While the pork is cooking, cook the pasta according to the package instructions.
In a small bowl, mix together the brown sugar and garlic powder.
Add the sugar mixture to the pasta and toss to combine.
Once the pork is done, let it rest for 5 minutes before slicing.
Add the sliced pork to the pasta and toss to combine.
